blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,215 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 41".
